description: CompositionGrey hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has drawstrings for the hood, long sleeves, a full zippered placket and two pockets in the sidesFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this sweatshirt with its plush fabric. The velveteen sheen in this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this sweatshirt from s.oliver with denims, a tee and closed-toe casual flats.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
